allowed_use: select future TAMU-specific epsilon fields only after source/property labels and same definitions are locked
required_evidence: F_A; F_m; secondary_flow_intensity; stratification_metric; recovery errors; pressure and energy residuals; source-envelope labels
forbidden_use: do not train on held-out/external rows; do not tune to final scorecards
acceptance_signal: calibration rows state exact fields, formulas, time windows, plane labels, and no-runtime-leakage status

allowed_use: detect false negatives and model-form error under frozen candidate thresholds
required_evidence: same fields as train plus residual-owner table and same-QOI uncertainty status
forbidden_use: do not move thresholds after validation unless a new task resets the split
acceptance_signal: false-negative/model-error rows are reported as residual ownership, not absorbed into K/Nu

allowed_use: score final switching logic only after thresholds and model form are frozen
required_evidence: locked epsilon values; locked feature labels; pressure/thermal residual scoring; source/property labels
forbidden_use: no threshold selection, model selection, or coefficient tuning
acceptance_signal: holdout reports pass/fail and uncertainty, not recalibration

allowed_use: test transfer to val_salt or future non-training source families
required_evidence: same locked logic plus source-envelope overlap/failure labels
forbidden_use: no admission expansion without separate source-envelope review
acceptance_signal: external-test misses are reported as transfer limits or future evidence needs
